name: fasol-agent
description: Fasol Agent API skills — Solana trading on the Fasol platform via Bearer-key HTTP. The catalog is a discovery index for AI agents; each entry points to a self-contained sub-skill file in skills/.

skills.title: Instant market buy / sell
skills.subtitle: POST /swap — fires NOW at the current on-chain price. Optional ?wait=true for synchronous confirmation.
capabilities: Instant buy with amount_sol or instant sell with sell_p%
Optional synchronous wait (?wait=true) up to 60s
Custom slippage (slippage_p) overriding the user's saved defaults
prompts: Buy 0.1 SOL of this token now
Close my entire position on this coin
Mirror a wallet's buy with a 10% size ratio

skills.title: Limit / TP / SL / trailing orders
skills.subtitle: POST /orders — trigger-based orders the engine fires when price meets the condition.
capabilities: Absolute limit_buy / limit_sell with trigger_price
Percent-relative TP / SL / trailing computed against entry
Sell percentage from 0..100 of holdings
prompts: Set a limit buy when price drops to X
Add a TP at +30% and SL at -15% on this position
Set a trailing TP that activates after +50% and trails 30% pullback

skills.title: Cancel one order by ID
skills.subtitle: DELETE /orders/:id — best-effort cancel. Idempotent on already-deactivated orders.
capabilities: Cancel any pending or sleeping order by ID
Safe to call on already-fired orders (no-op)
prompts: Cancel order ord_abc
Clean up TP / SL from a previous cycle

skills.title: List open + sleeping orders
skills.subtitle: GET /orders or GET /coin/:ca/orders — see what's armed and what's lurking from past cycles.
capabilities: All orders on the bound wallet, both armed and sleeping
Filter to one coin via /coin/:ca/orders
source_kind / source_id ownership tags for safe cleanup
prompts: Show all my open orders
What TP/SL are armed on this coin?
Find sleeping TP/SL stale from previous cycles

skills.title: TP / SL / trailing — persist and re-arm lifecycle
skills.subtitle: Critical reading for any looping strategy: fired orders persist and re-arm on the next buy of the same coin.
capabilities: Understand re-arm-on-next-buy semantics
Cleanup pattern: track IDs, cancel on cycle end
Survive process restart with persisted ID file or startup sweep
prompts: Why did my position close instantly after I bought again?
Build a copy-trader that doesn't get killed by stale TP/SL

skills.title: Current state of a coin
skills.subtitle: GET /coin/:ca/stats — full CoinStat snapshot (price, MC, liq, holders, dev hold, deployer, social flags, mayhem).
capabilities: ~40 numeric + boolean + string fields per coin
Includes deployer aggregates so most decisions don't need a separate /dev call
Primary input for every trading decision
prompts: Get current stats for this coin
Check dev hold and top-10 concentration before buying

skills.title: OHLC candles — historical + last 5 min
skills.subtitle: GET /candles (historical, heavy) and GET /candles_fast (last 5 min, standard).
capabilities: 1..3600s interval, up to 1000 candles per call (historical)
Cursor pagination via before / after
Sub-second freshness from Redis (fast variant, 1..300s interval)
prompts: Show me the last 30 minutes of 5s candles
Walk back through historical OHLC since this coin migrated

skills.title: Per-tick historical snapshots for one coin
skills.subtitle: GET /snapshot/coin/:ca/history — server auto-buckets to ≤1000 rows.
capabilities: Trajectory of price / MC / liq / holders / vol / drop_from_ath_p
Auto-bucketed time series, 24h cap
Phantom-gate matches the alert engine
prompts: Show me the last hour trajectory of BONK
Plot the holders curve since launch

skills.title: Min/max/extremes for one coin in a window
skills.subtitle: GET /snapshot/coin/:ca/agg — single-row aggregate, very cheap.
capabilities: min/max for price, MC, liq, drop_from_ath_p
max for holders and vol_5m
snapshot_count for window coverage
prompts: What was the ATH market cap in the last 6 hours?
Did liquidity ever drop below 5k?

skills.title: When a condition first / last held for one coin
skills.subtitle: POST /snapshot/coin/:ca/first_match — find earliest or latest snapshot matching filters.
capabilities: Direction first/last across a window
Same filter language as snapshot_scan / alert_simulate
Returns single row or null
prompts: When did this coin first cross 1M MC?
Last time liq was above 50k?

skills.title: Cross-coin discovery at a moment in time
skills.subtitle: POST /snapshot/scan — find coins matching filters right now (or at past T).
capabilities: ~60 numeric (min/max) filter columns
Boolean and launchpad filters
Auto-derived from same field map as alert_simulate
prompts: Find migrated pumpfun coins with liq > 50k and dev_hold < 5%
Discover coins matching my alert filter right now

skills.title: Live price ticks for one coin (SSE)
skills.subtitle: GET /agent_stream/coin/:ca — sub-second price ticks via SSE.
capabilities: One event per parsed block (~400ms)
Survives pair migration (filter by coin_address)
15s heartbeat for proxy liveness
prompts: Stream live ticks for this coin to react sub-second
Watch a flip in real time

skills.title: Every swap on one coin (SSE)
skills.subtitle: GET /agent_stream/coin/:ca/trades — one event per swap, with size and per-wallet context.
capabilities: LiveTrade payload per swap (buy/sell, amount, price, wallet)
Compute rolling volume / VWAP / order-flow yourself
Server-side wallet-type classification on each trade
prompts: Compute 1m volume and buy/sell ratio
Watch maker count over time

skills.title: Live confirmation events for your wallet's swaps (SSE)
skills.subtitle: GET /agent_stream/tx — processed and confirmed events for every swap you fire.
capabilities: Two events per swap: processed (~400ms) + confirmed (~3-7s)
Tells you the actual fill price, slippage, and tx hash
Closes the loop on /swap and /orders fires
prompts: Wait for my buy to confirm and tell me the fill price
Track every TP/SL fire on this wallet

skills.title: Tracked-wallet trade stream
skills.subtitle: Live SSE of every swap from the user's tracked wallets — the backbone of any copy-trader.
capabilities: Subscribe to every buy/sell on tracked wallets in real time
Built-in trade-state classification (first_buy / buy_more / sell_part / sell_all / sell_air)
Server-side filtering by authenticated user_id
prompts: Mirror a smart-money wallet's buys at 10% size
Alert me when a tracked deployer wallet sells
Build a copy-trader strategy

skills.title: Smart Money trade stream
skills.subtitle: Live SSE of every swap by any wallet in Fasol's curated Smart Money cohort (global stream, optional ?wallets= filter).
capabilities: Subscribe to every SM-cohort swap in real time (global firehose)
Same LiveTrade payload as tracked-wallet-trades (with cohort rank in group_id)
Optional server-side wallet allow-list via ?wallets= (up to 50)
prompts: Mirror the top-20 Smart Money wallets by rank
React when any SM wallet first-buys a new coin
Compute live volume from SM-only swaps

skills.title: Caller publications stream
skills.subtitle: Live SSE of caller 'calls' for callers the user follows. Same per-user feed the /callers UI page consumes.
capabilities: call_init backfill batch on connect (up to 30 most-recent calls)
call_new live publications + call_prices periodic price updates
Server-side dedup within (caller, coin) so reposts don't duplicate
Per-user filtering via the user's tb_user_caller_subscription
prompts: Mirror new calls from a specific followed caller at 5% size
Build a 'wait for the second caller' strategy on the same coin
Track ATH-after-call performance of callers I follow

skills.title: Live alert match + milestone SSE
skills.subtitle: GET /agent_stream/alert_matches — coins matching the user's alert filters + multiplier milestones.
capabilities: Two event types: alert_match and alert_milestone
Optional ?alert_id= narrows to one alert
Server-side dedup; no duplicate (alert, coin) firings
prompts: React to my alert with my own trade logic instead of platform autobuy
Send me a notification on every alert milestone

skills.title: Alert backtest
skills.subtitle: Replay an alert filter against the last 1-5 days of db.coin_snapshot. Returns matched coins + ATH-multiplier hit rates (1.5x/2x/5x/10x).
capabilities: Replay 1-5 days of historical snapshots against any AlertConfig
Per-coin ATH after trigger and trigger price
Aggregated 1.5x/2x/5x/10x hit-rate statistics
Same filter semantics as snapshot_scan (shared CH builder)
prompts: Would this alert filter have caught anything yesterday?
Backtest my Pump.fun + only_migrated + makers_5m >= 50 filter for the last week
Compare two alert configs by hit-rate over 3 days

skills.title: Discover wallets by profit / activity / behaviour
skills.subtitle: POST /wallet_search — find wallets matching a strategy profile (profit, hold pattern, sniper-share, etc.).
capabilities: Pre-filters from db.wallet (lifetime profit, win rate, sniper share, wallet type)
Post-filters from behavior (median hold, cycle count, sub-60s scalp rate)
Optional pf_share_48h (heavy CH JOIN)
5-min server-side cache on canonicalised body
prompts: Find top profit traders active in the last hour
Find slow-hold conviction wallets with cycle_count >= 30

skills.title: Per-wallet trade performance (how did its buys do?)
skills.subtitle: GET /wallet/{wallet}/trades — per-coin PnL fold of any wallet's swaps: SOL in/out, balance, mark-to-market PnL. ⏳ next backend release.
capabilities: Per-coin realised + mark-to-market PnL over 1d/7d/30d/90d windows
Entry price (in_sol/in_coin), buy/sell counts, first/last tx timestamps
Any Solana wallet — public analytics, not limited to tracked wallets
Server-cached 30 s, shared with the web wallet drawer
prompts: How did the tokens this tracked wallet bought last 30d perform?
Win-rate and net PnL of wallet X this week

skills.title: Deployer launch history
skills.subtitle: GET /dev/:deployer — last 50 launches + summary stats (launched/migrated count, recent ATH averages).
capabilities: Per-token list with ATH, current MC, migration state
Aggregates: launched_count, migrated_count, migrated_p, lastN_avg_ath
prompts: Is this deployer a serial-rugger or do they migrate cleanly?
Show me what this dev launched in the past

skills.title: List and inspect alerts
skills.subtitle: GET /alerts, GET /alert/:id/stats, GET /alerts/triggered/:coin — read-only alert state.
capabilities: List all alerts with triggered_count + hit-rate stats
Per-alert drill-down: coins matched + multipliers reached
Per-coin: which alerts matched this coin
prompts: Show all my alerts and their hit rates
Which alerts matched on this specific coin?

skills.title: Create / update / pause / autobuy alerts
skills.subtitle: Full CRUD + pause/unpause + Telegram toggle + autobuy config. Requires manage_alerts (not default-on).
capabilities: Full AlertConfig body shape
Pause/unpause and autobuy-only shims for cheap mutations
Filter changes clear match history (server-enforced)
prompts: Create an alert for pumpfun migrated coins with vol_5m > 10k
Pause my noisy alert without losing its history
Enable autobuy 0.05 SOL with TP/SL on this alert

skills.title: Tracked wallets — CRUD + warm-up batch
skills.subtitle: Add / remove / group wallets, and warm up local state with the last ~50 swaps before subscribing.
capabilities: Full CRUD over the user's watch list
Bulk add with group_id and notify flags
Heavy-tier warm-up batch (5 rpm — once on startup, then stream)
prompts: Add these 5 wallets to my 'snipers' group
Warm up local state with the last batch of tracked swaps

skills.title: Wallet groups — folders for tracked wallets
skills.subtitle: CRUD over user-defined groups (folders) like 'smart money', 'snipers', etc.
capabilities: Create / rename / re-colour groups
Delete is non-destructive — wallets become ungrouped
prompts: Create a 'whales' group
Rename a group

skills.title: Identity + scopes + bound wallet
skills.subtitle: GET /scope — what this API key is allowed to do, and which wallet trades will fire on.
capabilities: agent_id, agent_name, scopes, allowed_tools
Bound wallet address (your 'self' identifier)
412 with agent_wallet_unset / agent_wallet_invalid for unbound state
prompts: What can this API key do?
Which wallet will my swaps fire on?

skills.title: Open positions on the bound wallet
skills.subtitle: GET /positions — current open positions, unrealised PnL.
capabilities: amount_coin, value_sol, value_usd per position
avg_buy_price_usd, current_price_usd, unrealised_pnl_sol, unrealised_pnl_p
prompts: What's my current exposure?
Did I forget any open positions from earlier?

skills.title: Realised trade history — source of truth for PnL
skills.subtitle: GET /trades — every fill (orders engine + /swap + UI) with prices, fees, USD value.
capabilities: Filter by coin_address, from_ts, to_ts
Returns successful and failed trades alike
tx_type tells you origin: limit_buy, take_profit, agent_swap, qb, etc.
prompts: Compute my realised PnL on this coin
List my last 50 trades

skills.title: Bound-wallet SOL balance
skills.subtitle: GET /wallet_balance — live SOL balance with pre-computed USD.
capabilities: sol_balance_lamports + sol_balance + sol_balance_usd
Current sol_price_usd alongside
prompts: How much SOL do I have?
Can I afford this 0.1 SOL buy plus fees?
